title: Ability to Set a Maximum Value Limit for Number Columns
excerpt:

posts.author: SivanO (Sivan Orren)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our development boards, we use two number columns: Estimated Story Points and Actual Story Points.
We want to ensure that the values entered in these columns stay logical and realistic. Specifically, the maximum value in either column should not exceed the maximum number of story points one person can complete in a sprint.

|Is there a way to restrict the number entered into a number column? We sometimes see mistakes where non-logical or excessive values are inserted.

Feature request:
We need the ability to define a maximum allowed value for a number column, so that if a user tries to enter a number above the limit, it would either prevent them or alert them.

This would help maintain the quality of our planning and reporting.
Would love to hear if others have faced this issue too

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
